import {useState} from 'react' import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom' import userToken from '../utils/userService' const LoginTest = ({handleSignupOrLogin}) => { const navigate = useNavigate() const [formData, setFormData] = useState() const handleChange = (e) => { setFormData({...formData, [e.target.id] : e.target.value}) } const handleSubmit = async(e) => { e.preventDefault(); try{ await userToken.login(formData); handleSignupOrLogin() navigate('/login') } catch (err){ alert('Invalid Credentials') } } return (
Sign Into Your Account
) } export default LoginTest
